---
title: "API Reference"
toc: true
---

# `aria_nbv` API Reference

This section is generated from Google-style docstrings in `aria_nbv/aria_nbv/`.
The published GitHub Pages build refreshes these pages via `quartodoc` in
`.github/workflows/quarto-publish.yml`.

This is now the public implementation-contract surface. The retired manual
implementation pages were archived because package docstrings are closer to the
code and easier to keep current. Use the generated contracts for ASE/EFM
snippets, strict VIN offline-store v7, target selection, rollout Zarr,
finite-candidate generation, rendering, RRI metrics, and VIN one-step scoring.

Prefer `aria_nbv.data_handling` for stable import surfaces. The
`Implementation Contracts` section expands selected internal modules whose
schema, masking, lineage, and actor/oracle boundaries are important for thesis
experiments. The `VIN Core` entries document the active one-step model internals
behind training and inference.

{{< include _api_index.md >}}
